component.name: Bforartists
component.summary: Blender but with a UX for artists

description.p:
Bforartists is a complete, free and opensource 3D suite to create CG content. It offers you the full 3D art pipeline to create game graphics, pre-rendered movies and stills. From modeling, sculpting, texturing, rigging, animation, rendering, up to post processing.
This gives the full power of Blender but with an alternative UI and user experience. Keyboard-only features are now available through the UI, nodes are given icons and accessible add sidebar, icons are colored to make things easier to find. Everything is tailored for the visual top-level user experience.
Bforartists stands for “Be For Artists”. A reminder to develop for the user, not the programmer.

ul.li: Cleaned up User Interface. Lots of unnecessary double, triple or even more identical menu entries are combined, removed and/or exposed.
Extended User Interface. Many tools that were formerly hotkey only have a menu entry now.
Asset Shelves in object mode and node editors
Rearranged User Interface. Some things are better accessible now, some less frequent operators are no-longer in the way anymore.
Improved default settings.
Colored Iconography with silhuette, color coding, form and detail consistently placed everywhere.
A configurable toolbar with icon buttons.
A pinnable tool shelf with the header based tools, exposed at a top-level in panels.
Tabs in the toolshelf.
A node add toolshelf for quick point and click
Improved default workspace layouts.
Left aligned checkboxes and text where possible.
Indented titles for properties.
Better and more tooltips.
A new default keymap, reduced to a minimal and necessary hotkey layout with 3D navigation that can be exclusively done by mouse.
Better contrast on a readable standard theme.
Some extra add-ons to improve usability, like the reset 3D View add-on, Brush Panels or the Set Dimensions add-on with which you can scale in world coordinates in edit mode.
And lots of extra small details: like not so many delete confirm dialogs, quick editor toggles, scene management in the outliner, and more.
More color with Colored outliner rows and Node backgrounds
and all the latest from the Blender main trunk weekly!

The target audience for Bforartists are hobbyists and indie artists coming in from other software. This gives accessibility and familiarity to a niche that may not be content with vanilla Blender out-of-the-box. Blender tries to target Blender professionals and experienced users. That’s a completely different audience and development target.

screenshot.caption: Bforartists splash by Krysidian and the Umbraven_cu team
Bforartists window with the compositing workspace
Bforartists window with the 2D Animation workspace

ul.li: This is a hotfix and commulative stability release with 7 show-stopper bug fixes, including the missing Last Operator panel, HIP support, and theme saving.
This is part of an exciting release with all the latest from Blender 4.3 and 4.4 to the date - with a chunk of 176 pieces of love from us this cycle.
This is a hotfix release with 9 bug fixes including a critical showstopper. Highly recommend updating to this version!
This is part of an exciting release with all the latest from Blender 4.3 and 4.4 to the date - with a chunk of 130 pieces of love from us this cycle.

This release has a new fresh set of features including Asset Shelves for the 3D View and Node Editors, new Power User tools subdivision parity opt-in, Grease Pencil 3.0 interface love, extensions UX love! With another 33 task and features added to everything from the latest from Blender 4.2.1 and 4.3.0 Alpha (main branch) to the date.
This build also comes with some showstopper that needed to be dealt with to give you the best of the best! So version 4.2.1 has been skipped.

This release has a new fresh set of features including Brush Assets, Grease Pencil 3.0 with Geometry Nodes compatibility, EEVEE 2.0, Multi-pass AOV's in the Viewport Compositor, and offline and online extensions love! With another 151 task and features added to everything from the latest from Blender 4.2.0 and 4.3.0 Alpha (main branch) to the date.
This release has a new feature to assign Collection Exporters for batch exports and another 24 task and features added to everything from the latest from Blender 4.1.1 and 4.2.0 Alpha to the date.

This release has a new feature called the 3D Sequencer, where you can use scene strips as shots in a "pinned" video sequencer timeline to change the 3D View scene contents, camera, and animation dynamically - also with a new Power User Tools addon and another 123 task and features added to everything from the latest from Blender 4.1.0 and 4.2.0 Alpha to the date.

This version comes with a new Presentation addon, a Shader Node kit for the Asset Browser and procedural materials, and general maintenance with all the latest features, stability, and updates from Blender with all our additional love from us.
This version has an additional 150 tasks and bug fixes with everything from Blender 4.0.0, 4.0.1 and 4.1.0 development.

Bforartists 3 Version 3.6.2 is maintenance and bugfix release. This release comes with stability, updates and the latest from Blender, with additional love from us.
This version has and additional 21 tasks and bug fixes from us everything from Blender 3.6.2 and 4.0.0 development.

Bforartists 3 Version 3.6.1 is maintenance and bugfix release. This one comes with the changes from Blender 3.6.1 with the usual updating and changes to keep Bforartists consistent and compatible with the latest from Blender.
This version comes with 30 tasks and additional bug fixes from us with the updates and features from Blender 3.6.1 and 4.0.0 development.

Bforartists 3 Version 3.6.0 is maintenance and bug fix release. It also comes with a special "add as instance" toggle for the Asset Browser. This build is about Blender 3.6.0 feature set with the usual updating and changes to keep this consistent and compatible with the latest.
This version comes with 50 tasks and bug fixes from us with the additional updates and features from Blender 3.6.0 and 4.0.0 development.
